user.title: Connect to your Omni panel
user.description: Enter the IP/hostname of your HAI/Leviton Omni Pro II controller and the 32-character hex Controller Key. Use `omni-pca decode-pca <file>.pca --field controller_key` to extract the key from a PC Access export. Optionally provide a path to a saved `.pca` file to load panel programs from disk instead of streaming them from the controller.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-enter Controller Key
reauth_confirm.description: The panel at {host}:{port} rejected the saved key. Paste the new 32-character hex Controller Key.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the panel. Check the host, port, and that TCP/4369 is open.
error.invalid_auth: The Controller Key was rejected by the panel.
error.invalid_key: Controller Key must be exactly 32 hexadecimal characters (16 bytes).
error.pca_not_found: No file at the supplied .pca path.
error.pca_decode_failed: Could not decode the .pca file. Check the per-install key.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs.
